chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. S – 370 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For hearing of bail application 1. For orders on office objection at Flag-A 2. For hearing of bail application 08.12.2023 Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Jatoi, Additional Prosecutor General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- None present for the applicant. No intimation is received. Same was the position on the last date of hearing. Accordingly, this bail application is dismissed in non-prosecution. J U D G E Abdul Basit
